mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.perm_code FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.perm_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rp.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 1
SELECT user_id FROM sys_user_role WHERE role_id = #{roleId}

SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.parent_id, p.perm_code, p.perm_name, p.perm_type, p.path, p.component, p.icon, p.sort_order, p.status, p.created_at FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.perm_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rp.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND p.perm_type IN (1, 2) AND p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.sort_order
SELECT * FROM sys_permission ORDER BY sort_order, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_permission (parent_id, perm_code, perm_name, perm_type, path, component, icon, sort_order, status) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{permCode}, #{permName}, #{permType}, #{path}, #{component}, #{icon}, #{sortOrder}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_permission WHERE parent_id = #{parentId}
